title: Lead SEO Specialist at Yatra Capital India

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Yatra Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Yatra Capital India family as a SEO Specialist in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Yatra Capital India:
Yatra Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yatra Capital India!
